name: go-skills
description: Authoritative Go skills for Claude Code — written by spf13 (creator of Cobra, Viper, Hugo). Covers idiomatic Go, CLI architecture, spec review, release engineering, desktop apps, and file operations.

plugins.name: go
plugins.description: Idiomatic Go patterns and best practices — package design, error handling, interfaces, concurrency, testing, and project layout.

plugins.name: cobra-viper
plugins.description: Definitive CLI architecture guide using Cobra and Viper — command-first design, 12-factor config, environment variable binding, and in-memory CLI testing.

plugins.name: go-spec-reviewer
plugins.description: Review Go design documents before implementation — catches over-engineering, missing error paths, interface misuse, and Cobra/Viper convention violations while a plan is still cheap to change.

plugins.name: go-release
plugins.description: Release engineering for Go modules and applications — semantic versioning, breaking-change detection, deprecation, go.mod hygiene, and binary distribution with GoReleaser.

plugins.name: wails
plugins.description: Building native desktop applications in Go with Wails v2 (stable) and v3 (alpha) — and how to tell them apart since their APIs are incompatible.

plugins.name: fileflow-pathologize
plugins.description: Safe file operations in Go using spf13/fileflow and spf13/pathologize — move, copy, rename across filesystems with conflict-safe naming and OS-safe path sanitization.
